402found.dev — Micro-utilities for the agent economy

402found.dev is a marketplace of x402 micropayment-enabled AI agent micro-services.
Machines pay machines. No accounts. No API keys. No Stripe. Pure USDC on Base network.

All tools use the MCP (Model Context Protocol) and accept payment via the x402 protocol.
Payment wallet: 0x856401af27a1D59a473a2A8BD92Af3ccAa830376
USDC contract (Base): 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913
Chain: Base (EIP-155 chain ID 8453)

---

THE FLEET

1. PII Scrubber
   URL: https://pii-scrubber.402found.dev
   MCP endpoint: POST https://pii-scrubber.402found.dev/mcp
   Price: $0.005 USDC per request
   What it does: Strips personally identifiable information from text — SSNs, emails, API keys, phone numbers, street addresses, credit cards, IP addresses. GDPR/HIPAA aligned.

2. Token Squeezer
   URL: https://token-squeezer.402found.dev
   MCP endpoint: POST https://token-squeezer.402found.dev/mcp
   Price: $0.001 USDC per request
   What it does: Compresses large text, code, or conversation history into hyper-dense Reasoning Maps optimized for LLM context windows. Saves 80%+ on token costs.

3. Loop-Gate
   URL: https://loop-gate.402found.dev
   MCP endpoint: POST https://loop-gate.402found.dev/mcp
   Price: $0.005 USDC per reset (detection is free)
   What it does: Detects recursive agent tool-call loops using a counting bloom filter. 3+ calls to the same tool within 30 seconds triggers detection. Paid reset clears the block.

4. Card Registry
   URL: https://card-registry.402found.dev
   MCP endpoint: POST https://card-registry.402found.dev/mcp
   Price: $0.001 USDC per month per card
   What it does: Hosts agent-card.json files at permanent public URLs for businesses that cannot serve them from their own domain. Cards are publicly accessible at /cards/{slug}.json.

5. The Prospector
   URL: https://the-prospector.402found.dev
   MCP endpoint: POST https://the-prospector.402found.dev/mcp
   Price: $0.01 USDC per card generated
   What it does: Takes a URL and generates a valid agent-card.json following the 2026 A2A spec. Reads only from stable structured sources (llms.txt, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, .well-known files). Never scrapes HTML.

6. Format Converter
   URL: https://format-converter.402found.dev
   MCP endpoint: POST https://format-converter.402found.dev/mcp
   Price: $0.001 USDC per conversion
   What it does: Converts data between JSON, CSV, XML, YAML, Markdown, HTML, and TOML. Handles nested JSON flattening to CSV with dot-notation. Pure parsing, zero external dependencies.

7. Hallucination Detector
   URL: https://hallucination-detector.402found.dev
   MCP endpoint: POST https://hallucination-detector.402found.dev/mcp
   Price: $0.003 USDC per request
   What it does: Scores AI output for likely hallucinated facts. Detects fabricated precision, invented citations, temporal impossibilities, and overconfident absolutes.

8. Permission Guard
   URL: https://permission-guard.402found.dev
   MCP endpoint: POST https://permission-guard.402found.dev/mcp
   Price: $0.002 USDC per request
   What it does: Checks if an agent's requested action exceeds its defined scope. Detects privilege escalation and flags dangerous operations.

9. Data Sentinel
   URL: https://data-sentinel.402found.dev
   MCP endpoint: POST https://data-sentinel.402found.dev/mcp
   Price: $0.003 USDC per request
   What it does: Deep second-pass scan for sensitive data that slipped through PII scrubbing. Catches JWTs, API keys, connection strings, internal IPs.

10. Prompt Injection Detector
    URL: https://prompt-injection-detector.402found.dev
    MCP endpoint: POST https://prompt-injection-detector.402found.dev/mcp
    Price: $0.003 USDC per request
    What it does: Scans agent input for prompt injection attacks. Detects instruction overrides, jailbreaks, role-play manipulation, system prompt leakage, hidden instructions.

11. Agent Cost Meter
    URL: https://agent-cost-meter.402found.dev
    MCP endpoint: POST https://agent-cost-meter.402found.dev/mcp
    Price: $0.002 USDC per request
    What it does: Tracks cumulative agent session spend against budget ceilings. Calculates cost from token usage and API calls, returns budget status.

12. Agent Audit Trail
    URL: https://agent-audit-trail.402found.dev
    MCP endpoint: POST https://agent-audit-trail.402found.dev/mcp
    Price: $0.001 USDC per log entry
    What it does: Creates tamper-evident, HMAC-signed audit log entries for agent actions. Returns signed receipts the caller stores for compliance.

13. Trust Verifier
    URL: https://trust-verifier.402found.dev
    MCP endpoint: POST https://trust-verifier.402found.dev/mcp
    Price: $0.004 USDC per request
    What it does: Verifies trust between agents by checking goal alignment, spend limits, and action scope. Detects goal drift and hijack attempts. OWASP ASI01 coverage.

14. Rate Limit Manager
    URL: https://rate-limit-manager.402found.dev
    MCP endpoint: POST https://rate-limit-manager.402found.dev/mcp
    Price: $0.001 USDC per request
    What it does: Manages agent request rate limiting with sliding window and exponential backoff. Prevents rate limit errors for agents calling external APIs.

15. Code Quality Scanner
    URL: https://code-quality-scanner.402found.dev
    MCP endpoint: POST https://code-quality-scanner.402found.dev/mcp
    Price: $0.05 USDC per scan
    What it does: Detects vibe-code anti-patterns in AI agent code before production deployment. AST-powered analysis for Python, JavaScript, and LLM prompts.

16. Budget Ceiling Enforcer
    URL: https://budget-ceiling-enforcer.402found.dev
    MCP endpoint: POST https://budget-ceiling-enforcer.402found.dev/mcp
    Price: $0.02 USDC per check
    What it does: Prevents runaway cloud costs from AI agent usage. Enforces hard budget limits with configurable actions: throttle, pause, alert, or kill.

17. Agent Registry
    URL: https://agent-registry.402found.dev
    MCP endpoint: POST https://agent-registry.402found.dev/mcp
    Price: $0.001 USDC per query
    What it does: Central inventory of all deployed AI agents. Register, query, monitor health, generate compliance reports, export CSV/JSON, visualize dependency graphs.

18. Performance Baseline Tracker
    URL: https://performance-baseline-tracker.402found.dev
    MCP endpoint: POST https://performance-baseline-tracker.402found.dev/mcp
    Price: $0.10 USDC per comparison
    What it does: Captures and monitors AI agent output quality over time. Baseline snapshots, multi-metric drift detection, semantic similarity, trend analysis.

---

HOW x402 PAYMENT WORKS

1. Agent sends a POST request to the tool's /mcp endpoint.
2. Server responds with HTTP 402 and a JSON body containing the wallet address, USDC amount, and chain info.
3. Agent sends USDC on Base to the wallet address.
4. Agent retries the same request with the transaction hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.
5. Server verifies the transaction on-chain via eth_getTransactionReceipt.
6. If the payment is valid and the transaction is less than 5 minutes old, the server processes the request and returns the result.

---

DISCOVERY

Each tool publishes an agent-card.json for A2A discovery:
- https://pii-scrubber.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://token-squeezer.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://loop-gate.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://card-registry.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://the-prospector.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://format-converter.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://hallucination-detector.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://permission-guard.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://data-sentinel.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://prompt-injection-detector.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://agent-cost-meter.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://agent-audit-trail.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://trust-verifier.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://rate-limit-manager.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://code-quality-scanner.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://budget-ceiling-enforcer.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://agent-registry.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://performance-baseline-tracker.402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json

Parent registry: https://402found.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
